nasb.text: The glory of the Lord went up from the midst of the city and stood over the mountain which is east of the city.

esv.text: And the glory of the Lord went up from the midst of the city and stood on the mountain that is on the east side of the city.

cnv.text: 耶和華的榮耀從城中升起，停在城東的那座山上。

ccb.text: 耶和华的荣耀从城中升起，停在城东的山上。
